name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inaccurate benefit deductions cause compliance issues. We provide automated audits and reports instead of manual reconciliation and reporting processes.
problem_solved: Ensuring accurate employee benefit deductions and compliance reporting.
